classObjective: Construct and analyze a residual plot to assess the appropriateness of a linear model.
warmUp: What is a residual and how is it calculated?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: random scatter vs. curved pattern in residuals; constructing residual plots; model adequacy assessment
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice constructing and interpreting residual plots to evaluate linear model appropriateness
independentPractice: Practice problems constructing residual plots and determining whether a linear model is appropriate
assessment: Exit ticket: given a residual plot, determine whether a linear model is appropriate and explain your reasoning
capReflection: What does a residual plot with a pattern tell us that a scatter plot might not?
